info.name: Dexa Absence Service - Smoke Test Case
info.description:
Smoke tests for Dexa Absence Service API.

Run order:
1. Auth / Login
2. Employee / Get My Profile
3. Employee / List Employees (HR only)
4. Employee / Create Employee (HR only)
5. Employee / Update My Profile
6. Attendance / Create Check-in or Check-out
7. Leave Request / Create Leave Request

request.description: Stores token, user_id, employee_id, email, role into collection variables.

exec: pm.test('returned id matches stored employee_id', function () {

request.description: Requires: token, employee_id (set by Login).

pm.test('each employee has required fields', function () {

exec: pm.test('response has updated employee fields', function () {

request.description:
Own account only. Accepts phoneNumber and/or profilePic — at least one required.

Requires: token, employee_id (set by Login).

request.description: Requires: token, employee_id (set by Login).

exec: // date must be exactly today — compute and inject it
console.log('Absence id ->', body.id, '| date ->', body.date, '| checkIn ->', body.checkInTime);
pm.test('status is NOT 201 - request failed', function () {

request.description:
Records a daily check-in or check-out. No `type` field — that distinguishes it from a leave request.

date is auto-set to today by the pre-request script (validation rejects anything other than today).
At least one of checkInTime or checkOutTime is required. Format: HH:mm or HH:mm:ss.
checkInTime must be before checkOutTime if both are provided.

Stores absence_id into collection variables.

item.name: Get admin absence check - in and out

request.description: Returns all absences for the stored employee. Optional query: startDate, endDate (yyyy-mm-dd).

exec: // startDate and endDate must be after today
pm.test('response is an array of absences', function () {
pm.test('each absence has required fields', function () {

request.description:
Submits a leave request. Presence of the `type` field distinguishes this from a check-in/out.

type: sick | wfh | annual_leave
startDate / endDate: yyyy-mm-dd, must be after today (auto-set by pre-request script).
Status will be pending until HR approves or rejects.

Stores leave_request_id and leave_absence_id into collection variables.
Returns all absences for the stored employee. Optional query: startDate, endDate (yyyy-mm-dd).

exec: pm.test('response has data array and meta', function () {

request.description: HR only. Returns 403 if logged in as employee role.
Stores token, user_id, employee_id, email, role into collection variables.

HR only. Creates a new user + employee record.

Required fields: username, email, displayName, position, departmentId.
departmentId must be one of: HR, IT, FINANCE, MARKETING, SALES.

Stores created_employee_id into collection variables.
